evidence: Initial PR #36 audit run reached the test step and failed before later reports were uploaded.
repair_rule: Audit workflows should collect logs and status files before artifact upload instead of stopping early.

evidence: Research repositories contain fertile physics, energy and math claims that require proof, simulation, measurement or benchmark gates before promotion.
repair_rule: Every strong claim should carry OAK level, evidence, residue and next test.

evidence: Autonomous construction is valuable only when outputs remain reviewable.
repair_rule: Use branch packet, draft PR, checks, review and canon promotion.

evidence: Repository roles, claim registries, schemas and audit reports are not yet uniformly present across all six repositories.
repair_rule: Propagate REPO_CANON_ROLE, claims, schemas and repo-audit workflow by additive draft PRs.
